⁠@David28311It just wasn’t anything special. DiCaprio and Sean Penn were strong, sure , but beyond that? By the halfway point the ending was already predictable. Every other scene had this annoying, tinkling instrumental soundtrack (felt like Joker 2 – only missing Leo breaking into song). Many scenes were absurd, which drained the film of seriousness and left it without real tension. For example: Leo gets caught after a chase, only to be free again two minutes later. On top of that, plenty of scenes were unnecessary , you could easily cut 40 minutes without losing anything.
